title: Principal Radiologist at Johnson & Johnson India

jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Johnson & Johnson India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Johnson & Johnson India in Jaipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Johnson & Johnson India:
Johnson & Johnson India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Johnson & Johnson India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
